headline: Why Alphabet (GOOGL) Stock Is Falling Today
summary: Shares of online advertising giant Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) fell 4.5% in the afternoon session after reports revealed that the release of its flagship Gemini 3.5 Pro AI model has been delayed by several months.

headline: Investors rotate within AI trade as slowing hyperscaler spending becomes a growing concern
summary: Investors are beginning to rethink their artificial intelligence strategies as concerns grow that the rapid expansion in hyperscaler spending could lose momentum over the next few years, prompting some fund managers to reduce exposure to semiconductor stocks in favour of software companies and major cloud providers. headline: Meta (META) Faces Employee Lawsuit Over AI Assisted Layoffs
summary: Meta Platforms (NasdaqGS:META) has been hit with a federal lawsuit filed by employees over AI-assisted layoffs. The suit alleges that Meta's use of AI in personnel decisions discriminated against protected groups, including workers with disabilities and pregnant employees. Plaintiffs are seeking to halt further layoffs and are calling for an independent audit of Meta's AI systems used in workforce management. Meta Platforms, the parent company of Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp and other...

headline: Netflix Sinks 11% on Soft Q3 Guidance as Analysts Warn It’s “Losing Narrative Control”
summary: Analysts say Netflix is losing control of its own story, and a single line buried in Friday's earnings report about future disclosures is making Wall Street more nervous than the guidance miss itself.

content.title: Netflix Sinks 11% on Soft Q3 Guidance as Analysts Warn It’s “Losing Narrative Control”
content.summary: Analysts say Netflix is losing control of its own story, and a single line buried in Friday's earnings report about future disclosures is making Wall Street more nervous than the guidance miss itself.
